items.title: PNR APP-02 — Decision: Lot status PENDING_LIVE vs Approved on auction assignment
items.notes: Wes raised in #-pnr-dev- at 1:55pm: AC step 8 says lot should show PENDING LIVE after auction assignment, but dashboard currently shows 'Approved - Awaiting Auction'. Decision needed: keep current behaviour or change to PENDING_LIVE?
